CREATE TABLE my_events (start UInt32, end UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE my_events_nulls (start Nullable(UInt32), end Nullable(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE my_events_large (start UInt32, end UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE my_events_complex (id UInt32, start UInt32, end UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, maxIntersectionsPosition(start, end) FROM my_events_complex GROUP BY id;
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(start, end) FROM (SELECT start, end FROM my_events WHERE start > 0 AND end > 0) AS valid_intervals;
CREATE TABLE second_events (start UInt32, end UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(t1.start, t1.end) FROM my_events t1 JOIN second_events t2 ON t1.end > t2.start GROUP BY t1.start;
